channel.title: Transcoding on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Transcoding on Pi Stack

item.title: Self-Hosted Video Transcoding: Tdarr vs Unmanic vs HandBrake Guide 2026
item.description: Video files are among the largest consumers of storage in any self-hosted media setup. Whether you are running jellyfin, Plex, Emby, or simply archiving content, unoptimized video libraries waste disk space and strain playback devices. The solution is automated transcoding — batch-converting your media to efficient formats like H.265/HEVC or AV1 without manual intervention.
